name: Moroccan Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Chicken - cut into serving pieces
1/4 cup White wine or apple juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin the chicken and place it in a pot or hearty skillet.
2. Add the remaining ingredients, except sesame seeds or almonds.
3. Cover and cook on low heat in a slow cooker for about 6 hours,
or cook in an oven on low heat for about 2 hours.
4. For faster cooking, bring to a boil over the range, reduce heat to low,
and simmer until tender (20-35 minutes depending on thickness of
chicken pieces).
5. Sprinkle sesame seeds or almonds on top before serving.
6. This yields six servings of 3 oz each.
Food Exchanges: 3 lean meats, 1 fruit, 1 vegetable
Calories per serving: 241
Protein: 22 g | Carbohydrate: 22 g | Fat: 7 g | Sodium: 270 mg
Potassium: 553 mg | Cholesterol: 55 mg
Source: Special Celebrations and Parties Cookbook, American Diabetes Association.
